title: rubus innominatus
intro: Rubus innominatus, also known as the New Mexico dewberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant's leaves and stems have been used in traditional herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus innominatus include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. Rubus innominatus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical application, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for medicinal purposes.
